items.headline: Short Shifts Power Rankings May 8 2026
items.description: Throw out the Xs and Os and join Short Shifts for our own weekly power rankings. What is our criteria? Whatever makes us smile, laugh, cry or any other wholesome feeling. This list is updated every Friday with our top moments of the week.

items.description:

items.headline: Minnesota penalty kill has to shape up against Colorado heading to Game 3

"It's a big topic of discussion," the forward said Friday.

items.headline: Gavin McKenna to skip World Championship to prepare for NHL Draft Combine
items.description:
Gavin McKenna, the projected No. 1 pick in the 2026 Upper Deck NHL Draft, has decided against playing for Canada at the 2026 IIHF World Championship in order to better prepare for the NHL Draft Combine and a critical summer of training.
The World Championship will take place in Zurich

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Radko Gudas injury status update second round NHL playoffs
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- Radko Gudas could return to the Anaheim Ducks lineup at some point during the Western Conference Second Round, coach Joel Quenneville said Friday.

items.headline: Hart Trophy finalists for Most Valuable Player for 2025-26 announced by NHL
items.description:
Nikita Kucherov, Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavid were named finalists for the Hart Trophy on Friday.
The award is given annually to the NHL player voted most valuable to his team by the Professional Hockey Writers Association.
The winner will be announced at a later date.

items.headline: 2026 King Clancy nominee essay Seattle Kraken Joey Daccord
items.description: Editor’s Note: The King Clancy Memorial Trophy is presented annually to the NHL player who best exemplifies leadership qualities on and off the ice and has made a noteworthy humanitarian contribution in his community.
